701Qo00001LlKqAIAV.distrLoc: The food distribution can be found in the back parking lot (accessible from Race St) of the Sobrato Center for Philanthropies. The building address is 1400 Parkmoor Ave, San Jose, CA 95126, however that will usually take you to the front side.
